productDisplayName: Baggit Women Udaan Jhuti Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9 cm Crafted from jute genuine leatherette with thin flap Metal stud details on the flap which has a magnetic button closure Brand badge on the back One pocket on the front Fabric inner with a separator Removable card holder inside with two sets of four card holders and two pockets on each side A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
